strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work was years ago on robotics
Cloud experience mentions AWS CDK only briefly; no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond self-hosted
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and rare, directly relevant AI-agent/MCP experience from the current role. Strong testing culture and architecture background align well with the role. Gaps in Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java are real but learnable given the depth of polyglot experience.
